clauses.title: Financial Reporting
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall deliver to the Administrative Agent and each Lender: (a) within 90 days after the end of each fiscal year, audited consolidated financial statements; (b) within 45 days after the end of each of the first three fiscal quarters, unaudited consolidated financial statements; and (c) concurrently with the delivery of such financial statements, a Compliance Certificate signed by a Financial Officer.
negotiation_points: Auditor qualifications (Big 4 vs recognized national firm)

clauses.title: Notices of Material Events
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall furnish to the Administrative Agent prompt written notice of: (a) the occurrence of any Default or Event of Default; (b) the filing or commencement of any action, suit or proceeding by or before any arbitrator or Governmental Authority against the Borrower or any Subsidiary that could reasonably be expected to result in a Material Adverse Effect; (c) the occurrence of any ERISA Event.

clauses.title: Existence; Conduct of Business
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower will, and will cause each Restricted Subsidiary to, do or cause to be done all things necessary to preserve, renew and keep in full force and effect its legal existence and the rights, licenses, permits, privileges and franchises material to the conduct of its business.
negotiation_points: Exception for dissolution of immaterial subsidiaries
Exception where failure to preserve is not materially adverse

clauses.title: Payment of Taxes
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower will, and will cause each Restricted Subsidiary to, pay its Tax liabilities before the same shall become delinquent or in default, except where (a) the validity or amount thereof is being contested in good faith by appropriate proceedings and (b) the Borrower or such Restricted Subsidiary has set aside on its books adequate reserves with respect thereto in accordance with GAAP.
negotiation_points: Minimum threshold for unpaid taxes to trigger default

clauses.title: Maintenance of Properties
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower will, and will cause each Restricted Subsidiary to, keep and maintain all property material to the conduct of its business in good working order and condition, ordinary wear and tear excepted.

clauses.title: Insurance
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower will, and will cause each Restricted Subsidiary to, maintain, with financially sound and reputable insurance companies, insurance in such amounts and against such risks as are customarily maintained by companies engaged in the same or similar businesses operating in the same or similar locations.
negotiation_points: Lender named as additional insured/loss payee

clauses.title: Books and Records; Inspection Rights
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower will, and will cause each Restricted Subsidiary to, keep proper books of record and account. The Borrower will permit any representatives designated by the Administrative Agent, upon reasonable prior notice, to visit and inspect its properties, to examine and make extracts from its books and records, and to discuss its affairs, finances and condition with its officers.
negotiation_points: Limit on frequency of inspections (e.g., once per year) at Borrower's expense absent Event of Default

clauses.title: Use of Proceeds
clauses.standard_text: The proceeds of the Loans will be used only for the purposes set forth in the Credit Agreement (e.g., refinancing existing debt, working capital, general corporate purposes). No part of the proceeds will be used in violation of Anti-Corruption Laws or Sanctions.
negotiation_points: Broad vs. specific use of proceeds

clauses.title: Compliance with Laws
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower will, and will cause each Restricted Subsidiary to, comply with all Laws, rules, regulations and orders of any Governmental Authority applicable to it or its property, except where the failure to do so, individually or in the aggregate, could not reasonably be expected to result in a Material Adverse Effect.
negotiation_points: Specific focus on Environmental Laws, ERISA, Anti-Money Laundering

clauses.title: Additional Collateral; Further Assurances
clauses.standard_text: Upon the formation or acquisition of any new Restricted Subsidiary, or the acquisition of any property by any Loan Party, the Borrower shall cause such Subsidiary or Loan Party to grant a security interest in such property to the Administrative Agent and take such actions as may be necessary to perfect such security interest.
negotiation_points: Time period to perfect security (e.g., 60-90 days)

clauses.title: Limitation on Indebtedness
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall not, and shall not permit any Restricted Subsidiary to, create, incur, assume or suffer to exist any Indebtedness, except Permitted Indebtedness.
negotiation_points: Ratio Debt (Incurrence-based): Unlimited debt if Pro Forma Leverage Ratio <= X.X
Acquired Debt (debt of acquired target not incurred in contemplation)

clauses.title: Limitation on Liens
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall not, and shall not permit any Restricted Subsidiary to, create, incur, assume or suffer to exist any Lien upon any of its property, assets or revenues, except Permitted Liens.
negotiation_points: Ratio Liens: Unlimited liens if Pro Forma Secured Leverage Ratio <= Y.Y

clauses.title: Restricted Payments (Dividends/Buybacks)
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall not, and shall not permit any Restricted Subsidiary to, declare or make any Restricted Payment, except...
negotiation_points: Builder Basket (Available Amount): Start date + 50% of Consolidated Net Income + Equity Issuances
Unlimited RP if Pro Forma Leverage <= Z.Z

clauses.title: Limitation on Asset Sales
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall not, and shall not permit any Restricted Subsidiary to, sell, transfer, lease or otherwise dispose of any asset, unless: (a) Fair Market Value is received; (b) >= 75% Cash Consideration; (c) Proceeds applied to repay Term Loans or Reinvested.
negotiation_points: Designated Non-Cash Consideration treated as cash (capped)
Step-downs in prepayment requirement based on leverage

clauses.title: Limitation on Investments
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall not, and shall not permit any Restricted Subsidiary to, make or hold any Investments, except Permitted Investments.

clauses.title: Transactions with Affiliates
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall not, and shall not permit any Restricted Subsidiary to, enter into any transaction with any Affiliate, except upon fair and reasonable terms no less favorable than could be obtained in a comparable arm's-length transaction with a non-Affiliate.
negotiation_points: Exceptions for management fees (up to a cap)

clauses.title: Restrictive Agreements (Burdensome Agreements)
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall not, and shall not permit any Restricted Subsidiary to, enter into any agreement that limits the ability of any Restricted Subsidiary to pay dividends or make distributions to the Borrower or to Grant Liens to the Lenders.
negotiation_points: Customary restrictions in Joint Venture agreements

clauses.title: Changes in Fiscal Year
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall not change its fiscal year end.
negotiation_points: Allowed if reasonably necessary for business purposes and notice given

clauses.title: Financial Covenants (Maintenance)
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower shall not permit the Total Net Leverage Ratio as of the last day of any fiscal quarter to exceed [Maximum Ratio]. The Borrower shall not permit the Interest Coverage Ratio as of the last day of any fiscal quarter to be less than [Minimum Ratio].
negotiation_points: Covenant Lite (no maintenance covenants for Term Loans, springing for Revolver)
Equity Cure rights (number of cures allowed, impact on EBITDA)

clauses.title: Payment Default
clauses.standard_text: Failure to pay principal when due, or interest/fees within [Grace Period] days.

clauses.title: Material Breach of Representations
clauses.standard_text: Any representation or warranty proves to have been incorrect in any material respect when made.

clauses.title: Covenant Default
clauses.standard_text: Failure to perform or observe any other term, covenant or agreement (other than Payment or Financial Covenants) which continues unremedied for [Cure Period] days.

clauses.title: Cross-Default / Cross-Acceleration
clauses.standard_text: Default under any other Material Indebtedness (Threshold Amount > $[Amount]) that results in acceleration (Cross-Acceleration) or permits acceleration (Cross-Default).
negotiation_points: Threshold amount typically $15-50M depending on deal size

clauses.title: Bankruptcy / Insolvency
clauses.standard_text: Commencement of voluntary or involuntary bankruptcy proceedings.
negotiation_points: 60 day grace period for dismissal of involuntary petitions

clauses.title: Change of Control
clauses.standard_text: Acquisition of beneficial ownership of >35% of voting stock by a person/group (other than Permitted Holders).

clauses.title: Judgments
clauses.standard_text: One or more judgments for the payment of money in an aggregate amount exceeding [Threshold] not covered by insurance.

clauses.title: ERISA
clauses.standard_text: An ERISA Event that results in liability exceeding [Threshold].

clauses.title: Invalidity of Loan Documents
clauses.standard_text: Any material provision of the Loan Documents ceases to be valid or enforceable; or any Security Interest ceases to be a perfected first priority Lien.

clauses.title: Excess Cash Flow (ECF) Sweep
clauses.standard_text: Borrower shall prepay Term Loans in an amount equal to [Percentage]% of Excess Cash Flow for such fiscal year, minus voluntary prepayments.
negotiation_points: Definition of ECF (deductions for capex, working capital, taxes)

clauses.title: Asset Sales
clauses.standard_text: 100% of Net Cash Proceeds from Asset Sales (subject to Reinvestment Rights).

clauses.title: Debt Issuance
clauses.standard_text: 100% of Net Cash Proceeds from the issuance of Indebtedness (other than Permitted Indebtedness).

clauses.description: Clauses related to collateral and security interests.

clauses.title: Grant of Security Interest
clauses.description: The borrower pledges assets to secure the loan.
clauses.standard_text: As security for the prompt and complete payment and performance when due of all the Obligations, each Grantor hereby grants to the Administrative Agent, for the benefit of the Secured Parties, a continuing security interest in all of its right, title and interest in, to and under all of the following Personal Property...

clauses.title: Perfection of Security Interest
clauses.description: Requirements to make the security interest legally enforceable against third parties.
clauses.standard_text: Each Grantor agrees that from time to time, at the expense of such Grantor, it will promptly execute and deliver all further instruments and documents... necessary or desirable... to perfect, protect or enforce the Security Interest.
negotiation_points: Timeframes for filing UCC financing statements

clauses.title: Remedies upon Default
clauses.description: Lender's rights to seize and sell collateral.
clauses.standard_text: If an Event of Default shall occur and be continuing, the Administrative Agent may exercise... all the rights and remedies of a secured party on default under the UCC... including the right to sell the Collateral.

clauses.title: Pledge of Securities
clauses.description: Granting a security interest in equity interests of subsidiaries.
clauses.standard_text: Each Pledgor hereby pledges to the Administrative Agent... all the Equity Interests... of each Subsidiary... and delivers to the Administrative Agent the certificates representing such Equity Interests.
negotiation_points: Delivery of certificates vs. uncertificated securities

clauses.title: Intellectual Property Security
clauses.description: Specific provisions for trademarks, patents, and copyrights.
clauses.standard_text: Each Grantor grants a security interest in all of its Intellectual Property... and agrees to file Short Form IP Security Agreements with the USPTO and Copyright Office.

clauses.title: After-Acquired Property Clause
clauses.description: Automatically attaches the security interest to property acquired by the borrower after the agreement is signed.
clauses.standard_text: The Security Interest shall attach to all after-acquired property of the Borrower that falls within the definition of Collateral, without the need for further action.

clauses.description: Standard clauses for commercial leases.

clauses.title: Payment of Rent
clauses.description: Obligation to pay base rent and additional rent.
clauses.standard_text: Tenant shall pay to Landlord Base Rent in the amount of $[Amount] per month, without deduction, offset, or abatement, on the first day of each calendar month.

clauses.title: Use of Premises
clauses.description: Restrictions on how the property can be used.
clauses.standard_text: Tenant shall use the Premises solely for [Permitted Use] and for no other purpose without Landlord's prior written consent.
negotiation_points: Broad 'general office use' vs. specific use

clauses.title: Assignment and Subletting
clauses.description: Tenant's right to transfer the lease.
clauses.standard_text: Tenant shall not assign this Lease or sublet the Premises without Landlord's prior written consent, which consent shall not be unreasonably withheld, conditioned or delayed.

clauses.title: Operating Expenses (CAM)
clauses.description: Pass-through of building operating costs to tenant.
clauses.standard_text: Tenant shall pay its Pro Rata Share of all Operating Expenses, including taxes, insurance, and maintenance costs.
negotiation_points: Caps on controllable expenses (e.g., 5% annual cap)

clauses.title: Tenant Improvements (TI) Allowance
clauses.description: Landlord contribution to build-out costs.
clauses.standard_text: Landlord shall provide a TI Allowance of $[Amount] per square foot. Any cost in excess of the TI Allowance shall be paid by Tenant.

clauses.title: Subordination, Non-Disturbance (SNDA)
clauses.description: Protects tenant if landlord defaults on mortgage.
clauses.standard_text: This Lease shall be subordinate to any future mortgage... provided that Lender agrees not to disturb Tenant's possession so long as Tenant is not in default.
negotiation_points: Requirement for SNDA from future lenders

clauses.title: Estoppel Certificate Requirement
clauses.description: Requires the tenant to verify the current status of the lease, usually for a prospective buyer or lender.
clauses.standard_text: Tenant shall, within ten (10) days after written request from Landlord, execute and deliver an estoppel certificate certifying that this Lease is in full force and effect and unmodified.

clauses.description: Agreements between creditors regarding priority.

clauses.title: Payment Subordination
clauses.description: Junior debt cannot be paid until Senior debt is satisfied.
clauses.standard_text: No payment on account of the Subordinated Obligations shall be made by any Loan Party... until the Senior Obligations have been paid in full in cash.

clauses.title: Lien Subordination
clauses.description: Junior liens are secondary to Senior liens.
clauses.standard_text: Any Lien on the Common Collateral securing the Second Lien Obligations... shall be junior and subordinate in all respects to any Lien on the Common Collateral securing the First Lien Obligations.

clauses.title: Standstill Provisions
clauses.description: Limits Junior Lender's ability to enforce remedies.
clauses.standard_text: Until the Discharge of Senior Obligations, the Second Lien Agent will not exercise or seek to exercise any rights or remedies with respect to any Common Collateral...

clauses.title: Turnover Provision
clauses.description: Requires Junior Lender to hand over payments received in violation of priority.
clauses.standard_text: If any payment or distribution is received by the Second Lien Agent in contravention of this Agreement, such payment shall be held in trust for the benefit of, and paid over to, the First Lien Agent.

clauses.title: DIP Financing Consent
clauses.description: Junior Lender agrees not to object to Senior Lender's DIP financing.
clauses.standard_text: The Second Lien Agent agrees that it will not object to any DIP Financing provided by the First Lien Lenders... provided that the Second Lien Lenders retain a junior lien on the same collateral.

clauses.title: Purchase Option
clauses.description: Junior Lender's right to buy out Senior Debt.
clauses.standard_text: Upon the occurrence of an Event of Default or Acceleration, the Second Lien Lenders shall have the option to purchase all (but not less than all) of the First Lien Obligations at par plus accrued interest.

clauses.title: Release of Collateral
clauses.description: Mechanism by which the Junior Lender agrees to release its lien when the Senior Lender does.
clauses.standard_text: If the First Lien Agent releases any of its liens on any Common Collateral in connection with a permitted sale, the Second Lien Agent agrees to automatically release its corresponding liens.
negotiation_points: Requirement that proceeds pay down Senior Debt

clauses.description: Specialized clauses for leveraged finance.

clauses.title: Accordion Feature (Incremental Facilities)
clauses.description: Allows borrower to increase the facility size without full lender consent.
clauses.standard_text: The Borrower may request the establishment of one or more new term loan commitments... in an aggregate amount not to exceed the Free and Clear Basket plus the General Debt Basket...

clauses.title: Yank-a-Bank
clauses.description: Right to replace a non-consenting lender.
clauses.standard_text: If any Lender does not consent to a proposed amendment... the Borrower may, at its expense, require such Lender to assign its Loans to an assignee.
negotiation_points: Required vote threshold (e.g., >50% must already consent)

clauses.description: Standard terms for OTC derivatives transactions.

clauses.title: Failure to Pay or Deliver
clauses.description: Event of default if a party fails to make a required payment.
clauses.standard_text: Failure by the party to make, when due, any payment under this Agreement or delivery under Section 2(a)(i) or 2(e) required to be made by it if such failure is not remedied on or before the third Local Business Day after notice of such failure is given to the party.

clauses.title: Credit Event Upon Merger
clauses.description: Termination event triggered if a merger weakens a party's creditworthiness.
clauses.standard_text: The party... merges with another entity... and the resulting entity is materially weaker from a credit perspective.

clauses.title: Close-out Netting
clauses.description: Process of terminating and netting all transactions upon default.
clauses.standard_text: Upon the designation of an Early Termination Date... the determining party shall calculate the Close-out Amount... and net all obligations into a single payment.
